title: 10 medicinal preparations of Pygeum africanum  (african plum)

preparations_list.preparation_desc: Pygeum africanum, also known as African plum, capsules is used to alleviate symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH), a common condition affecting men's urinary health. The capsules have been traditionally used in African medicine to treat prostate issues, and modern studies have confirmed its effectiveness in reducing inflammation and improving urine flow. Additionally, it may help with symptoms such as frequency, urgency, and nocturia, providing relief for men suffering from BPH-related discomfort.

Pygeum africanum, also known as African plum, tablets is used to treat various health issues. The tablets are made from the bark of the Pygeum africanum tree and have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH). They help to reduce the size of the prostate gland, relieving urinary symptoms such as frequent urination, weak urine stream, and nocturia. Additionally, they may also help with chronic inflammation, pain relief, and improve overall men's health.

Pygeum africanum, also known as African plum, teas is used to alleviate various health issues. The tea has been traditionally used to treat prostate problems such as benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) and prostatitis due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve urinary flow. Additionally, it may help with kidney stone prevention, improve blood sugar control in diabetics, and even support immune function and overall well-being.

Pygeum africanum, also known as African plum, decoctions is used to treat various health ailments. The decoction has been traditionally used to alleviate urinary tract symptoms such as frequency and urgency, as well as relieving inflammation and discomfort associated with prostate issues. Additionally, it has been found to have anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Its antioxidant properties also make it a potential natural remedy for certain cancers.

Pygeum africanum, also known as African Plum, tinctures is used to address various health issues. The tincture has been traditionally used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective against urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and bladder issues. Additionally, it has been shown to alleviate symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH), such as frequent urination and painful urination.

Pygeum africanum, also known as African plum, ointments is used to treat various health issues. The ointment has anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate symptoms of prostatitis, a common prostate condition. It is also effective in reducing inflammation and pain associated with hemorrhoids, varicose veins, and arthritis. Additionally, the ointment's antioxidant properties promote wound healing, improve skin tone, and soothe minor cuts and scrapes.

Pygeum africanum, also known as African plum, creams is used to alleviate symptoms associated with benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH). The cream's extracts have been shown to reduce the risk of prostate cancer and alleviate urinary tract symptoms such as frequent urination, incomplete voiding, and weak urine flow. Additionally, Pygeum africanum creams may also help improve overall prostate health by reducing inflammation and improving overall urinary function.

Pygeum africanum, also known as African plum, gels is used to alleviate various health issues. The gel extract has been traditionally used to treat prostatitis and benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH), reducing symptoms such as frequent urination, nocturia, and dribbling. It is also effective in relieving urinary tract inflammation, kidney stones, and prostate cancer. Additionally, the gel has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for skin wounds, burns, and oral health problems.

Pygeum africanum, also known as African plum, salves is used to treat various health issues. The salve is effective in reducing symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH), such as frequent urination and urinary retention. It is also used to alleviate prostate inflammation and improve overall prostate health. Additionally, the salve has anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds, making it a popular remedy for minor injuries and eczema.

Pygeum africanum, also known as African plum, poultices are used to treat various health issues. They have been traditionally used to soothe skin conditions such as eczema and acne, reduce inflammation and swelling, and even treat wounds and ulcers. The poultice is said to have antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in promoting wound healing and reducing pain. Additionally, Pygeum africanum poultices are believed to be beneficial in treating digestive issues like constipation and diarrhea.

intro: Pygeum africanum, also known as African plum, has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules. These preparations are useful for treating various health issues, including prostate problems, urinary tract infections, and inflammation. The extracts of Pygeum africanum have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making them effective in relieving symptoms associated with benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) and other urinary tract disorders.
intro_desc: Pygeum africanum, also known as African plum, has several medicinal preparations, such as extracts, capsules, and tinctures. These preparations are often used to alleviate symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH), including urinary frequency and nocturia. They are also used to support prostate health and reduce the risk of prostate cancer. Additionally, some preparations may be used to alleviate symptoms of andropause and male menopause.
